projects.name: 🧠 Brew Notes
projects.description: A local-first, AI-powered knowledge management app with rich markdown editing, wiki-links, semantic search, and offline-first sync. Built as a full-stack product from zero.

projects.name: 📚 Memora
projects.description: E-commerce platform for custom premium photobooks. Designed destination catalog, photo upload flow, book editor, and checkout. Full product from landing to order fulfillment.

projects.name: 🔌 Evernote MCP Server
projects.description: Open-source MCP server that lets LLMs (Claude, GPT, etc.) query and interact with your Evernote notes. Published on npm and used by the AI community.

projects.name: 🏨 Choice Hotels (Globant)
projects.description: Led frontend redesign of choicehotels.com booking flow, property pages, and rate filters serving millions of users. Optimized LCP, migrated JS to TypeScript, and delivered WCAG compliance.

projects.name: 🎓 Frontend School
projects.description: MVP landing page for a subscription-based programming school focused on Frontend development and AI for Frontend engineers.

projects.name: 🎮 Manikins Arena
projects.description: Interactive landing page for an online videogame, built for Life is The Game S.A.S with Web3 integration.

projects.name: 🔗 Blockchain Voting System
projects.description: Decentralized voting system on Ethereum Sepolia testnet using Solidity smart contracts and a React frontend.

projects.name: 📷 Photolalaphy Portfolio
projects.description: Creative photography portfolio with GSAP-powered animations and transitions.
